message:
refactor(freeze): Continue removing Zig codegen branches

- Remove Zig branches from put_field opcode
- Remove Zig branches from regexp opcode
- Remove Zig branches from get_loc_check, set_loc_uninitialized, put_loc_check_init
- Remove Zig branches from get_var_ref_check
- Remove Zig branches from call_method
- Simplify call_constructor to C-only output
- Remove Zig branches from push_atom_value fallback

71 isZig() calls remain (down from 82), all returning false.
Verified: frozen fib benchmark produces correct result (9227465, ~25ms)
